## Custom Theme System — Summary

### Files Created (2 new)

1. **`packages/shared/src/themes.ts`** — Theme definition types and built-in themes
   - `Theme` interface with `id`, `name`, `colors` (background, foreground, accent, sidebar, editor, terminal, statusBar), `fontFamily`, `fontSize`
   - 3 built-in themes: **T3 Dark** (default), **T3 Light**, **T3 Midnight**
   - `getTheme(id)` — returns a theme by ID (falls back to default)
   - `listThemes()` — returns all built-in themes

2. **`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`** — Theme selector with visual swatches
   - Each theme row shows a miniature preview (sidebar/editor/status-bar layout with accent dot)
   - Color chips show background, accent, and sidebar colors
   - Active theme gets a highlighted border and "Active" badge
   - Uses `role="radiogroup"` for accessibility

### Files Modified (3)

3. **`packages/shared/package.json`** — Added `"./themes"` subpath export following the existing pattern

4. **`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`** — Refactored to use the shared theme system
   - Now stores a theme ID (e.g. `"t3-dark"`) in localStorage instead of `"light"/"dark"/"system"`
   - Migrates legacy stored values (`"light"` → `"t3-light"`, `"dark"` → `"t3-dark"`, `"system"` → default)
   - Applies 9 CSS custom properties (`--theme-background`, `--theme-foreground`, `--theme-accent`, `--theme-sidebar`, `--theme-editor`, `--theme-terminal`, `--theme-status-bar`, `--theme-font-family`, `--theme-font-size`) to the document root
   - Returns `{ theme, setTheme, availableThemes, resolvedTheme }` — the `resolvedTheme: "light" | "dark"` field keeps backward compatibility with 4 other components that depend on it

5. **`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** — Replaced the old 3-option radio group (light/dark/system) with the new `<ThemeSelector />` component. Shows active theme name and resolved mode.
